text: Spain vs Austria LIVE: World Cup score, updates, stats and highlights - USA Today
fullText: The Spain and Austria national soccer teams hope to advance in the 2026 World Cup. Get live updates and goal highlights from reporters on the ground.

text: U.S. Olympic canoeist David ‘Davey’ Hearn charged in Reflecting Pool vandalism - NBC News
fullText: WASHINGTON — U.S. Olympic canoeist David “Davey” Hearn was indicted Thursday on a single count of destruction of property after he was accused of causing more than $1,000 worth of damage to the Lincoln Memorial Reflecting Pool.

text: U.S.-Iran Latest: Talks pause for slain ayatollah's funeral after Trump and mediators claim progress - CBS News
fullText: Negotiations between Iran and the U.S. will pause for a week for the funeral of Iran's slain supreme leader, but Trump, and mediators, say there's been progress.

text: ‘Bizarre’ planet orbiting dead star may preview fate of our solar system - CNN
fullText: A Jupiter-size exoplanet orbiting a dead star baffled astronomers. But the planet named WD 1856 b could preview the fate of our own solar system when the sun dies.

text: Trump bought Apple, Nvidia and other tech giants before tariff reversal fueled rebound - CNBC
fullText: The day before President Donald Trump walked back his tariff policy turned out to be one of his busiest days of 2025 for stock buying.

text: What to know about the Society of St. Pius X, the schismatic group excommunicated by the Pope - NPR
fullText: The Society of St. Pius X was excommunicated by Pope Leo for ordaining bishops without his permission. Its issues with the church run far deeper.

text: Stock Market Today: Nasdaq Falls After June Hiring Misses Expectations — Live Updates - WSJ
Meta Stock Falls as AI Cloud Plans Hit an Immediate Snag - Barron's
fullText: Meta stock got a boost on an unconfirmed plan to build a cloud business, but it faced competition from well-funded SoftBank less than 24 hours later.

text: How Trump made more than $1 billion on crypto when most of his coin’s investors lost money - CNN
fullText: President Donald Trump launched his $TRUMP memecoin in the days leading up to his second inauguration, ushering in a pro-crypto administration – and a lucrative family business.

text: Tick season is expected to be worse than normal as ER visits rise in much of the U.S. - CBS News
fullText: The CDC is reporting the highest rate of emergency room visits from tick bites since 2017 in many parts of the U.S.

text: Man who sold land for Kushner-backed Albania development probed over alleged money laundering, drug trafficking - CBS News
fullText: A man who sold land for a controversial, Jared Kushner-backed luxury development in Albania is suspected of money laundering and drug trafficking.

text: Russia lands heavy strikes on Ukraine’s capital, killing at least 21 - AP News
fullText: Russia has launched a massive drone and missile attack on Kyiv, killing at least 21 civilians in the city and injuring many more. Moscow says the assault is in retaliation for Ukrainian strikes on Russian oil facilities. The attack lasted 11 hours overnight i…

text: Last-minute launch problem delays satellite rescue mission for NASA - AP News
